message:
🌱 Add modelpack: Defining the diffID Generation Order in the Model Spec mission (#823)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "modelpack-22-defining-the-diffid-generation-order-in-the-model-spec",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "modelpack: Defining the diffID Generation Order in the Model Spec",
+    "description": "Defining the diffID Generation Order in the Model Spec. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current modelpack deployment",
+        "description": "Review the modelpack model-spec repository:\n```bash\ngit clone https://github.com/modelpack/model-spec.git\ncd model-spec\n```\nThis issue is about defining the order for generating diffIDs when model layers contain directories with multiple files."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review modelpack configuration",
+        "description": "Review how diffIDs are currently generated:\n\nModel Spec uses files as layers, and like OCI image layers, they have a sequential relationship. The spec needs to define a fixed order for generating `diffIDs` of files within a directory to ensure consistent hashing across different implementations."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Defining the diffID Generation Order in the Model Spec",
+        "description": "The fix introduces a `ModelFS` structure that defines a deterministic ordering for generating diffIDs when model layers contain multiple files in a directory.\n\nKey changes:\n- Annotations are for layer-specific descriptions\n- Config is for general model properties\n- `ModelFS` provides a canonical file ordering for consistent diffID generation\n\nSee the fix PR for details: https://github.com/modelpack/model-spec/pull/25"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Verify that diffIDs are generated consistently:\n```bash\n# Build a model artifact and check diffID generation\noras push <registry>/<repo>:<tag> ./model-dir:application/vnd.cnai.model.layer.v1.tar\n\n# Verify the manifest contains correct diffIDs\noras manifest fetch <registry>/<repo>:<tag> | jq '.layers[].digest'\n```\nConfirm that the diffIDs are generated in a deterministic order matching the ModelFS specification."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Right now we define a lot of model general information as annotations. They should be defined as a field of model config.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "modelpack",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "modelpack"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/modelpack/model-spec/issues/22",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/modelpack/model-spec",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/modelpack/model-spec/pull/25"
+    },
+    "reactions": 0,
+    "comments": 14,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "oras"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working ORAS CLI installation and access to an OCI-compliant registry for testing model artifacts."
+  },
+  "security": {
